mechanism_narrative: A persistent downward trend in FEDFUNDS over the trailing 3 months lowers the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and reduces borrowing costs for corporations, mechanically supporting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS trailing 3-month slope and 20-day forward SPX returns is below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or returns during declining-rate periods are not statistically higher than during flat/rising periods (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage points above its 6-month trailing low, this signals an inflection into labor market deterioration that historically precedes broad economic slowdown, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as earnings expectations reprice downward.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3pp above its trailing 6-month minimum
failure_condition: In more than 50% of historical instances where the UNRATE trigger fires, 60-day forward SPX returns are positive, or the average forward return in triggered windows is not significantly below the unconditional average (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in RSAFS (retail sales) and HOUST (housing starts) reflects synchronized strength in consumer and housing demand that is not captured by either series alone; this combined demand impulse feeds into corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint RSAFS-HOUST momentum interaction term shows Rank IC below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or the interaction model does not outperform the sum of independent single-series RSAFS and HOUST models in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion regime where FEDFUNDS is elevated, decelerating INDPRO growth signals supply-side capacity strain giving way to contraction, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as industrial output weakness propagates to broader earnings.
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with restrictive monetary policy
failure_condition: During periods with FEDFUNDS above 4% and decelerating INDPRO, 60-day forward SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of instances, invalidating the regime-conditional negative relationship.

mechanism_narrative: A steady month-over-month increase in PAYEMS reflects ongoing labor market expansion that supports consumer income and spending, producing a modest positive drift in S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as the market incrementally prices in continued economic resilience.
failure_condition: Rank IC between trailing PAYEMS month-over-month change and 5-day forward SPX returns remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation exceeds 4%, markets anticipate more aggressive future FEDFUNDS tightening, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days until inflation moderates.
failure_condition: In more than 50% of triggered high-inflation instances, 20-day forward SPX returns are positive, or the average triggered return is not significantly different from baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: In a housing-cycle downturn regime, defined by HOUST falling more than 10% from its trailing 12-month peak, weakening housing starts foreshadow broader consumer demand contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as construction and related sectors slow.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10% from trailing 12-month peak
failure_condition: During periods when the HOUST decline trigger is active, 60-day forward SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of cases, or Rank IC in triggered windows is not significantly negative (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: The joint condition of accelerating INDPRO growth combined with low and stable FEDFUNDS reflects an environment of expanding industrial capacity without tightening financial conditions, an interaction not captured by either series alone, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as risk appetite responds quickly to this favorable supply-monetary combination.
regime_hint: early-to-mid cycle expansion with accommodative policy
failure_condition: The interaction term of INDPRO acceleration and low FEDFUNDS fails to produce Rank IC above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or does not outperform independent single-series models in out-of-sample comparison.
